subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of the Most Merciful from the Lote-Tree of the Bayán in the midmost heart of Paradise hath verily been raised up in truth. This is a Day wherein hath shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الرحمن من سدره البیان فی قطب الجنان قد کان بالحق مرفوعا هذا یوم فیه اشرقت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
